mapper.select: SELECT id, account, password, username, email, role, status, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, account, password, username, email, role, status, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE account = #{account}
SELECT id, account, password, username, email, role, status, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` ( account, username, password, email, role, status ) VALUES ( #{account}, #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status} )
